name: secops
description: Cybersecurity team toolkit — SOC, incident response, threat modeling, risk management, vulnerability management, GRC, fraud analysis, DevSecOps, security awareness, threat intelligence. 12 agents, 8 skills, hybrid orchestration with workflow templates. Aligned to ISO 27001, NIST CSF, MITRE ATT&CK, PCI DSS, and Vietnamese cybersecurity regulations.
